nodes.name: Anthus
nodes.summary: Anthus（Anthus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联44种鸟类，如山鹨、Mountain pipit、平原鹨等44种鸟类。

nodes.name: Malindi pipit
nodes.summary: The Malindi pipit (Anthus melindae) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae. It is found in Kenya and Somalia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland and subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Malindi pipit (Anthus melindae) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae. It is found in Kenya and Somalia.
